_primaryContact: Josh Hendrick (H&M owner) — internal only. Public site CTAs (hero, about, estimate form, JSON-LD) use the client line 251-240-8386. The demo purchase bar is OFF for this paid client (showDemoPurchaseBar:false); the reusable feature is kept in code for future prospect sites.
_brandMapping: Client palette: Primary #050505 (black bg), Secondary #F2F2F2 (weathered silver text), Accent #B88A32 (construction gold), lighter gold #D4A94A. Industrial/rugged premium — black steel, weathered silver, construction gold.
_productionNote: dist/hm-services/index.html is a bespoke, compact, mobile-first one-page production site maintained directly (it is the committed + deployed artifact). It does NOT regenerate from the generic premium-service template — do not run `ep:build -- hm-services` against it without first porting these one-page features into the factory template. Editable service data also lives in a single HM_DATA object at the top of the page's inline script.
description: Property improvement, landscaping, concrete and material delivery throughout Fairhope and Baldwin County. H&M Services helps homeowners, contractors and property managers complete outdoor and property-improvement projects through one reliable local company.

pillars.blurb: Concrete, fences, structures, and outdoor improvements.

pillars.blurb: Land clearing, demolition, tree and stump removal.

about: H&M Services helps homeowners, contractors and property managers complete a wide range of outdoor and property-improvement projects through one reliable local company. From landscaping and concrete to material delivery, clearing and maintenance, H&M is prepared to help improve the property from the ground up.

whyUs.title: Local to Baldwin County
whyUs.text: Based in Fairhope and serving the surrounding Gulf Coast communities.

whyUs.title: One Call, Many Services
whyUs.text: From landscaping and concrete to material delivery, a wide range of property services under one roof.

whyUs.title: Residential & Commercial
whyUs.text: Property work for homeowners and businesses alike.

brand.styleNotes: Rugged premium: black steel, weathered silver, construction gold, industrial typography. Clean modern one-page layout — not a generic landscaping template.
